testcase.name: setUp

error.message: Could not start a new session. Response code 500. Message: session not created: probably user data directory is already in use, please specify a unique value for --user-data-dir argument, or don't use --user-data-dir Host info: host: 'codespaces-4dff2b', ip: '127.0.0.1' Build info: version: '4.25.0', revision: '8a8aea2337' System info: os.name: 'Linux', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '6.8.0-1030-azure', java.version: '21.0.7' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Command: [null, newSession {capabilities=[Capabilities {browserName: chrome, goog:chromeOptions: {args: [--disable-notifications], binary: /usr/bin/google-chrome, extensions: []}}]}]
